mapper.select: SELECT `m`.`index` AS `index`, `m`.`room_index` AS `roomIndex`, `m`.`message` AS `message`, `m`.`created_at` AS `createdAt`, `u`.`emp_id` AS `senderEmpId`, `u`.`name` AS `senderName`, `t`.`display_text` AS `senderTeamName`, `r`.`display_text` AS `senderRoleName`, `u`.`image_url` AS `senderImageUrl` FROM `wh`.`chat_messages` `m` LEFT JOIN `wh`.`users` `u` ON `m`.`sender` = `u`.`emp_id` LEFT JOIN `wh`.`teams` `t` ON `u`.`team_code` = `t`.`code` LEFT JOIN `wh`.`roles` `r` ON `u`.`role_code` = `r`.`code` WHERE `m`.`index` = #{index}
